creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
Created attachment 253271
screenshot of cantata with icons missing.

audio/cantata is missing icons after upgrading from 2.5.0 to 3.2.x. Downgrading to 2.5.0 fixes the issue.

Issue persists when cantata is built from sources as well.

I filed a report to the upstream as well:

https://github.com/nullobsi/cantata/issues/35
